name: internet-business-skills
description: Evidence-based research workflows for internet business decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Public-evidence research workflows for internet business decisions.
interface.longDescription: A compact Codex skill pack for ecommerce and internet business research: mine bad reviews, compare competitors, portray likely audiences, and verify commercial ideas with public evidence.
defaultPrompt: Verify this ecommerce idea with public evidence.
Analyze competitor positioning for this product.
Find representative bad reviews for this product.
